ddt:Target.Name: HU6_420_Mid_FreshUp2_6_00.00.18.ddt
ddt:Target.Description: Note: A formal request/response parameter xx, yy, zz,... is only relevant, if its data have a formal specification within the same chapter.

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: learn mode start reject - ignition state is not the state on
learn mode failed - no valid input data received
learn mode failed - no stable input data received

Test.Description: Update Map Data - Read Fault Update Media
Update Map Data - Write Fault HDD
Update Map Data - Reset during Update
Update Map Data - User Stops Update
Update Map Data - Map Update Media is not compatible with headunit Software, HU has to be updated before installation of Map data.
Update Map Data - Update not finished successfully
Update Map Data - Map data on HDD are not compatible with current HU software
Update Map Data - Wrong PIN Code
Update Map Data - Data Base On Update Media Not Consistent
Update Map Data - Data Base On HDD Not Consistent
Update Map Data - Data Base not activated for this car
RVC/Park Man Input Image not correct or missing
The power supply in the system is too low.
The power supply in the system is too high.
The power supply is too low.
The power supply is too high.
High Speed HMI-CAN Communication Bus Performance.BusOff.
Lost communication with electronic ignition lock
MOST Signal Loss in front of Pos. 0 detected (no signal for a short-duration)
MOST Signal Loss in front of Pos. 1 detected (no signal for a short-duration)
High Speed HU-CAN Communication Bus Performance.BusOff.
Lost communication with Central Contol Element
Lost communication with Display Rear L
Lost communication with Display Rear R
